title: Tennis-court arrival, helmets on (Nano Banana group-shot locked, v2)
preRenderNote: Composition is anchored by the Nano Banana 2-character group still (group_ep13_clip12_tennis_arrival.png). Both girls have distinct color-anchored helmets (Sara=pink, Eva=teal) which differentiates them visually. Locks the count at exactly 2.
prompt: Wide cinematic shot of @ep13-clip12-group — outdoor green tennis court with white painted lines softly visible, chain-link fence + suburban houses BACKGROUND-OUT-OF-FOCUS, soft warm afternoon light. The composition is anchored by the @ep13-clip12-group pre-rendered group still — exactly TWO girls locked in place: Sara CENTER-LEFT (PINK helmet), Eva CENTER-RIGHT (TEAL helmet). Kling animates the still gently — soft smiles, gentle in-place sway, hands moving softly within their locked poses. POSITION LOCK — both girls stay in their EXACT same physical spots from the source still throughout the entire 10s. Exactly TWO people in the entire frame. Distinct color-anchored helmets prevent sister mix-up. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara (pink helmet) looks around the court with cheerful kid-wonder, both hands clasped softly at her chest in arrival pose. Sara (cheerful warm kid-voice from her locked spot): "We MADE it!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva (teal helmet) softly claps her hands together with delight, both hands at her chest. Eva (cheerful giggle, beaming, locked in place): "We zoomed all the way! Even with helmets!" Both girls stationary in their locked spots, helmets on. Calm cheerful warm kid-show ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: each girl has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Both stay grounded with both feet planted on the court throughout. Helmets stay buckled. The tennis court stays plain clean.
